response.justification: Bogdan has a broad web and full-stack background with genuine geospatial/GIS domain exposure through GISCollective and Green Map, and some high-performance systems experience at Sociomantic. However, the role's primary requirement is modern C++ or Rust in commercial environments for routing/navigation data pipelines — areas where Bogdan's profile is critically thin. His C++ exposure is limited to a 2014-2015 stint at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project; Rust is absent entirely. His current and recent trajectory is firmly TypeScript/Node.js/web, making him a poor fit for a low-level systems role focused on geospatial routing tile generation.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS domain knowledge from GISCollective platform and Green Map GIS application development
Demonstrated experience with high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of requests per second (Sociomantic)
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development across multiple roles
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (2014–2015 at NI and a student thesis); no Rust experience whatsoever
Entire recent career trajectory (2018–present) is TypeScript/Node.js/web — no systems-level or compiled-language work in production
No experience with routing data pipelines, navigation tile generation, or traffic/map-update integration — the core responsibilities of this role
